text.title: Model Onboarding Checklist — Procedure
text.summary: 4-step procedure from input brief to signed-off output checklist.

list.item: Input: Provider announcement URL, internal capability gap brief.
Action: Record model id, context size, modality, provider, pricing, availability tier in onboarding record.
Output: intake.json with model card metadata.
Decision gate: If model is in private beta without our org access, file access request and pause.
Input: Golden set, hallucination test suite, guardrail policies.
Action: Run eval suite, record diff vs incumbent per task. Run safety/red-team checklist.
Decision gate: If eval diff worse than incumbent on regression-critical tasks, abort or reroute to fine-tuning experiment.
Action: Register model in gateway, add cost/usage telemetry, smoke-test through the actual production code path.
Output: PR(s) merged behind feature flag; smoke-test report.
Decision gate: If smoke-test fails on critical path, do not proceed to canary.
Input: All phase-3 artefacts + cost projection + rollback plan + named approver.
Action: Canary rollout at low traffic share, observe SLOs, ramp on approval; record gate memo.
Output: Onboarding record marked status=live with traffic_share and approver fields populated.
Decision gate: If any SLO regresses during canary, execute the recorded rollback plan and reopen phase 2.
